name: elegy-obsidian
description: Obsidian vault bridge skill for read/write/search against local Obsidian vaults.

interface.shortDescription: Read, write, and search local Obsidian vaults
interface.longDescription: Thin skill wrapping the official Obsidian v1.12+ CLI for vault-aware file creation, search, navigation, task toggling, and tag inspection.
defaultPrompt: Search this Obsidian vault for recent notes.
